title: AdoraBuild: Structures
description: Adds over 100 new structures to enhance the world exploration
body:
![AdoraBuild: Structures](https://i.imgur.com/9Yva3tp.png)

**AdoraBuild: Structures** adds over 100 new structures like houses, castles, temples, hidden treasures, etc. to enhance the world exploration. Generated structures are biome specific and fit perfectly into the environment.

Other features:
- Adds new advancements
- Covers most of the original Minecraft biomes in all dimensions
- Supports server-side mode, client is optional for Dutch, German, French, Spanish, Polish, Ukrainian and Chinese translations
- Supports the most popular world generation mods:
    - Biomes O' Plenty
    - Terralith
    - Regions Unexplored
    - Incendium
    - Nullscape
    - BetterNether
    - BetterEnd
    - Endless Biomes
    - End's Phantasm
    - Nature Arise
    - Nyctophobia
    - Gardens of the Dead
    - William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks! 😊
